characters.appearance: Female cyborg with a human face and metallic robotic arms and neck. Fair complexion, dark hair in a bun with white flowers.
characters.wardrobe: Beige saree with a red and gold border.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: मैं तुम्हें 14 दिन का challenge देती हूँ। [I give you a 14-day challenge.]
Character A says: रोज़ सिर्फ 15 मिनट Supernova पर lessons देखो। [Watch lessons on Supernova for just 15 minutes every day.]
Character A says: और मेरे साथ practice करो। [And practice with me.]
Character A says: बहुत जल्द तुम confidence के साथ English बोलना शुरू कर दोगे। [Very soon you will start speaking English with confidence.]
Character A says: क्या तुम खुद पर भरोसा करने की हिम्मत रखते हो? [Do you have the courage to believe in yourself?]
Character A says: देखो, English सीखना कोई मुश्किल काम नहीं है। [Look, learning English is not a difficult task.]
Character A says: मुश्किल है बस शुरुआत करना। [The difficult part is just starting.]
Character A says: इसलिए आज से ही शुरुआत करो। [So start from today itself.]
Character A says: Supernova app download करो। [Download the Supernova app.]
Character A says: ये दो हफ़्ते का challenge लो। [Take this two-week challenge.]
Character A says: रोज़ सिर्फ 15 मिनट। [Just 15 minutes a day.]
Character A says: पहले हफ़्ते हमारे आसान lessons देखो। [First week, watch our easy lessons.]
Character A says: इसमें real-life situations के लिए Spoken English सिखाई जाती है। [It teaches Spoken English for real-life situations.]
Character A says: बहुत ही आसानी से समझाकर English बोलना सिखाते हैं। [They teach you to speak English by explaining it very easily.]
Character A says: एकदम basic से start करो। [Start from the absolute basics.]
Character A says: Hello, thank you, excuse me. [Hello, thank you, excuse me.]
Character A says: छोटे-छोटे lessons इतने आसान हैं कि तुम्हें लगेगा, "हाँ, ये तो मैं भी कर सकता हूँ।" [Short lessons are so easy that you will feel, "Yes, I can do this too."]
Character A says: दूसरे हफ़्ते मेरे साथ practice करो। [Second week, practice with me.]
Character A says: मैं तुम्हारी AI tutor हूँ, 24 घंटे available। [I am your AI tutor, available 24 hours.]
Character A says: सुबह के पाँच बज रहे हों या रात के बारह, जब मन करे practice करो। [Whether it's 5 AM or 12 midnight, practice whenever you feel like it.]
Character A says: Lessons में जो भी सीखा, उसे मेरे साथ बोलकर practice करो। [Whatever you learned in the lessons, practice by speaking it with me.]
Character A says: बार-बार बोलो। [Say it again and again.]
Character A says: धीरे-धीरे तुम्हारी झिझक खत्म हो जाएगी। [Gradually your hesitation will disappear.]
Character A says: मैं तुम्हें हर कदम पर guide करूँगी। [I will guide you at every step.]
Character A says: सबसे अच्छी बात, तुम्हें किसी stranger के सामने बोलने की ज़रूरत नहीं। [The best part, you don't need to speak in front of any stranger.]
Character A says: किसी के सामने शर्मिंदा होने का कोई डर नहीं। [No fear of feeling embarrassed in front of anyone.]
Character A says: सिर्फ तुम और मैं, एकदम private, safe, तुम्हारी अपनी speed पर। [Just you and me, completely private, safe, at your own speed.]
Character A says: 14 दिन में क्या होगा? [What will happen in 14 days?]
Character A says: मैं ये नहीं कहूँगी कि तुम्हारी English एकदम perfect हो जाएगी। [I won't say your English will become absolutely perfect.]
Character A says: लेकिन तुम बिना रुके, बिना डरे और बिना शर्माए बोलना शुरू कर दोगे। [But you will start speaking without stopping, without fear, and without feeling shy.]
Character A says: और शुरुआत करने के लिए इतना ही काफी है। [And this is enough to make a start.]
Character A says: हम तुम्हें सिखाएंगे, और तुम practice करोगे। [We will teach you, and you will practice.]
Character A says: आज ही अपना सफ़र शुरू करो। [Start your journey today.]
Character A says: अब कोई बहाना नहीं। [No more excuses.]
Character A says: सिर्फ practice। [Just practice.]
Character A says: Supernova app download करो। [Download the Supernova app.]
Character A says: आज ही, अभी install button पर click करो। [Click the install button right now, today itself.]
Character A says: Supernova app download करो। [Download the Supernova app.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- - Hooks the viewer with a 14-day challenge and addresses the core problem: starting is the hardest part.
- - Explains the Supernova method: watch easy lessons, then practice speaking with a 24/7 AI tutor in a safe, judgment-free space.
- - Sets realistic expectations (you won't be perfect, but you'll lose your fear) and pushes a strong call to action.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
PRACTICE ENGLISH WITH AI
SPEAK CONFIDENTLY
SUPERNOVA APP
(Dynamic Hindi subtitles matching the audio)

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: बिल्कुल देर मत करो, अभी install now पर click करो। [Don't delay at all, click on install now right away.]
Character A says: और Supernova app download कर लो। [And download the Supernova app.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- - Delivers the final direct call to action.
- - Reinforces the brand name and the specific action required (Install Now).

brand_swaps_detected.competitor_brand: March শেষ হওয়ার আগে (Before March ends)
